analysis: The project contains a test-website with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The current theme appears to be a dark, cosmic theme with black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements. The CSS includes cosmic animations, black hole visuals, and swirling effects. The JavaScript handles interactive planets and animated slides. The theme is already aligned with the event's topic of black holes and includes animated objects and slides.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with more detailed cosmic animations, including pulsating black hole effects, swirling galaxy patterns, and glowing elements to make the theme more immersive.
Add more interactive sections related to black holes, such as detailed information about black hole types, formation, and effects, along with interactive diagrams or animations.
Improve the JavaScript to include more interactive features, such as drag-and-drop planets, zoom-in effects on black holes, and smooth transitions between animated slides.
